text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Copano Rickey has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer! Trainerrr!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Did it, though? I've been looking forward to
this ever since we won the tickets in that raffle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The timing's right! The weather's perfect! If we
head to a hot spring in an auspicious direction,
we'll be able to absorb so much luck! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So let's get going! C'mon, c'mon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We pack lightly and head to the hot springs.
Once we arrive...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Phewww. The water was amazing. My head still feels a bit fuzzy, though...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But in terms of feng shui, it's nothing to worry
about! This much might actually be pretty lucky!
choice_data_list:
Is there a special way to behave at hot springs
that takes advantage of feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Of course there is! I'll tell you all about it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Since we're here together, let's make good use of
feng shui and make ourselves super happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gratefully accept her offer to teach me the feng
shui way.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
First, when you go to the open-air bath, you need
to stand barefoot. Your feet need to really feel
the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And if there's any drinkable spring water, make
sure you have some. ♪ It'll help the qi build up in
your body.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
As for food, you should eat the local
specialties. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Combining the effects of the bath with your lucky
direction will have your fortunes improving in no
time!
choice_data_list: Okay! Let's order some special dishes!
Okay! Let's order some special dishes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making a toast, we enjoy a feast of local
treats. Then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chirp, chirp... Chirp...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's time for a morning bath! Face east and soak
up the sunlight...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now your luck's all topped up! ☆ You're shining
so brightly it's like you're a different person,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Copano Rickey's effusive praise, I can't
help but feel good. We end up enjoying a
thoroughly energizing vacation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now your fortunes are looking good in all kinds
of ways. ♪ Your luck with money has especially
improved, which means...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You might find yourself owning some pretty nice
stuff in the future. For example...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Nope. Something even better! Like...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: A condo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The living space of my dreams expands in my
mind... A spacious layout, antique furniture, a
wonderful view...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just coming on this hot spring vacation was
luxurious enough, but now even my dreams have
become ridiculously opulent.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I saw you smiling just now. ♪ Were you picturing
your future?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not this dream will actually come true
is a different story, though. Either way, I feel like
I'm on cloud nine.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You've taken such good care of me, Trainer. If
this trip has made you happy, then I'm happy
too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go for a walk after your morning soak.
The greenery here is gorgeous. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our vacation turns out to be a wonderful one,
filled with all kinds of fresh and fun experiences.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Copano Rickey and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
